01 — Identity

I don't build screens. I architect systems that think, feel, and scale.

I operate at the intersection of strategy, engineering, and art direction — treating a brand, a product, and an automation pipeline as one continuous system rather than separate deliverables.

هدوء، دقة، وتفكير بالأنظمة — لا مهام معزولة.

02 — Selected Work

Story experiences, not cards.

Each project is a system — identity, product, and intelligence engineered together.

/01
AURUM
Luxury Brand SystemIdentity · Digital2025

A complete identity and digital ecosystem for a luxury house — type, motion, and a spatial commerce experience built as one design language.

Enter case study →
/02
NEURAL FLOW
AI Workflow EngineAutomation · Agents2025

Autonomous content and operations pipelines powered by orchestrated AI agents — turning a founder's intent into shipped output without the manual middle.

Enter case study →
/03
VITALIS
Medical Operations PlatformSystems · UX2024

A calm, high-trust operating system for clinical operations at scale — reducing cognitive load for staff while keeping every critical signal one glance away.

Enter case study →
/04
MERIDIAN
E‑Commerce EcosystemShopify · Growth2024

A Shopify-native commerce system engineered for conversion and soul — storytelling, performance, and automated lifecycle marketing as a single machine.

Enter case study →
/05
FORM & SIGNAL
Branding SystemIdentity · Motion · Voice2023

Design language, motion grammar, and verbal identity composed as one living system — a brand that behaves consistently across every surface and channel.

Enter case study →
03 — Experimental AI Lab

Where intelligence becomes interface.

A1

Agent Orchestration

Multi-agent systems that plan, delegate, and self-correct across research, content, and operations.

A2

Generative Identity

Brand systems that generate their own variations — logos, motion, and voice from a single source of truth.

A3

Self‑Optimizing Funnels

Commerce flows that test, learn, and rewrite themselves toward the next best conversion state.

A4

Spatial UX

Interfaces that feel like environments — depth, light, and motion as primary navigation cues.

04 — Systems in Motion

One continuous system.

05 — Philosophy
Calm is a competitive advantage.
Think in systems, not tasks.
Taste is the algorithm.
Human‑guided. AI‑accelerated.
P01
Listen

Understand the system, the constraints, and the soul of the problem.

P02
Architect

Design the structure — logic, identity, and flow before pixels.

P03
Compose

Build with taste — motion, depth, and detail as first-class citizens.

P04
Refine

Obsess over the 1% — timing, weight, and feel until it disappears.

P05
Ship

Launch a living system that learns and improves after release.
